/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/_deps/imgui_coloredit-src/TextEditor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/code-editor.dir/src/editor_app.cpp.o" -o code-editor  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so -ldl /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
